subject: FW: Vendor Proposal - Pinnacle Analytics
content:
Olivia — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Karen from Product to get their
perspective on the Legacy CRM changes. In the meantime, I've created a
shared doc where we can track the open items:

  https://docs.google.com/d/6c4b761a28b734fe

Current open items (7 total):
- Vanguard integration testing (owner: Olivia)
- DataFlow Systems contract review (owner: Olivia)
- Observability Stack documentation (owner: Karen)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before
our Monday sync.

Thanks,
Olivia
--
Olivia Ramirez
Globex | Product Department
